step_rationale: Circulating miRNA released during acute MI; detects cardiomyocyte injury.
mechanism: miR-122-5p circulates as a myocardial injury-release biomarker in acute MI, enabling early detection of cardiomyocyte necrosis.

references.title: Circulating miR-122-5p as a potential novel biomarker for diagnosis of acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: International journal of clinical and experimental pathology
